subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-16 in Budapest
subcodes.first_line: Some of their [the Theosophists'] principles are similar to the teachings of this Cause. The Cause of God, however, is the embodiment of every divine principle
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی از تعالیمشان باین امر نزدیک است ولی امرالله جامع جمیع مسائل الهیه است
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @power of prayer, @pilgrimage [Hajj] in Islam, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @universality of the Cause
